_comment1: IP address of the MQTT broker.
_comment4: Mode of the fleet management. Options: SIMULATED_AGENTS or REAL_AGENTS. When set to REAL_AGENTS, real agents are controlled. An initial state message is required and the simulated agents do not send state and visualisation messages.
_comment5: Simulation run time in seconds. Value can be set high for 'infinite' simulation.
_comment6: Diameter of the circle the agent requires to rotate around its kinematic center point in meters.
_comment7: Time for pick and drop actions at TRANSFER stations in seconds.
_comment8: Time for initializing fine positioning before a transfer station in seconds.
